title: Marion Holiday Park
description: Straightforward cottages & poolside apartments, plus a caravan park & a kid's playground.
address: 323 Sturt Rd, Bedford Park SA 5042, Australia
hotelDescription:
This casual holiday park is 4 km from the beaches at Brighton and 13 km from the Adelaide Central Market in Adelaide's city centre.
 The relaxed cottages and poolside apartments provide flat-screen TVs, separate sitting areas, kitchens and private decks with BBQs. Some apartments and cottages feature iPod docks, DVD players and whirlpool tubs.
 There's a kids' playground and a water park with outdoor pools. Other amenities include a game room, a gym and an indoor tennis court, plus BBQ areas and a caravan site. Free parking is available.

title: Woodcroft Park
description: Simple cabins offering kitchenettes, plus a BBQ area, a playground & a fauna park with kangaroos.
address: 306 Bains Rd, Woodcroft SA 5162, Australia
hotelDescription:
On a parklike grounds, this unpretentious cabin complex is 2 km from Thaxted Park Golf Club and 10 km from Hallett Cove Conservation Park.
 The basic single-room and 2-bedroom cabins feature TVs, plus kitchenettes and living areas. Some have bunk beds, dining areas and/or washing machines.
 Amenities include a covered BBQ area and a playground, plus a fauna park with kangaroos and llamas. There's also an RV park. Minimum-stay rules may apply.

title: Discovery Parks - Hahndorf
description: Relaxed getaway offering rooms, suites and cottages, plus a bistro, outdoor activities and a pool.
address: 145a Mount Barker Rd, Hahndorf SA 5245, Australia
hotelDescription:
With views to the Adelaide Hills, this modern 13-hectare resort is 1.1 km from the M1 Freeway and 18 km from Belair National Park.
 Lodging is offered in relaxed rooms, as well as 1- to 2-bedroom suites, cottages and chalets. All feature free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs, plus minifridges, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. Suites, cottages and Bavarian–style chalets add microwaves, living rooms and/or decks; a 3-bedroom house has a kitchen. There's also a campground.
 Parking is free. Amenities include an outdoor pool, a playground, a giant chess set and half court tennis. There's also a bistro restaurant, a BBQ area and a guest laundry.

title: Mount Barker Caravan & Tourist Park - South Aust
address: 40 Cameron Rd, Mount Barker SA 5251, Australia

title: Aldinga Beach Holiday Park
description: Holiday park offering basic yurts & cabins with kitchens & air conditioning, plus a pool.
address: Cox Rd, Aldinga Beach SA 5173, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set on 2 hectares next to Aldinga Scrub Conservation park, these cabins and yurts are 2.4 km from Silver Sands beach and 13 km from Moana Sands Conservation Park.
 Rustic yurts and cabins have kitchens, TVs and air conditioning, plus Wi-Fi and shared facilities. Upgraded quarters add private bathrooms and verandahs. Some rooms have bunkbeds.
 Amenities include an outdoor pool and a hot tub, plus a BBQ/picnic area and coin-operated laundry facilities. There's also a playground, an air bounce pillow and basketball and beach volleyball courts.
